explanation: Inserted quotes around the executable and output file path to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to quoted arguments.
Used standard path formatting without any modification to test baseline detection.
Reordered arguments is not applicable for bcp.exe in this context.
Substitution of 'out' with equivalent syntax is not applicable here.
Omission of optional elements does not affect detection in this case.
Recoding or encoding of the command line does not bypass detection in this case.
